title: Create Aeronautics: Rechiseled Compatibility
description: Fixes the default 1 kpg weight for Rechiseled blocks in Create Aeronautics.
body:
**Tired of every Rechiseled block weighing 1 kpg?**

This compatibility addon assigns proper weights to all blocks from the **Rechiseled** mod for use in **Create Aeronautics**.

### **Requirements**
* [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)
* [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled)
